{{Quote|I've died so many times, even my own people think I'm a ghost.|Sol Sixxa|<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 1" />}}
'''Sol Sixxa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mere]] from [[Maramere]], and the leader of the [[Mere Resistance]]. He joined forces with the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] captain [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] to battle the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in the [[Karthakk system]].

==Biography==
[[File:Sol_Sixxa_Scurrg_H-6_Bomber_XWM.png|thumb|left|250px|Sixxa's Scurrg H-6 bomber]]
[[24 BBY/Legends|Eight years]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Sol Sixxa killed the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Toat]] and recovered an experimental [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] from the ''[[Syren]]'', for use aboard his own vessel, [[Revenant (Mere)|''Revenant'']]. Sixxa fed rumors that he himself was a spirit, using his ship's ability to cloak to bolster his infamy.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones" /> The leaders of the Mere grew wary of him, however, fearing that if he ever defeated the Trade Federation, he would turn on the population of Maramere. [[Loreli Ro]] was sent to hire [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], a local pirate, to defeat Sol Sixxa.

Though Nym confronted the hulking Mere, he found that he and Sixxa shared a common goal in the overthrow of the Trade Federation. After Nym outwitted Sixxa, the two agreed to join forces under Nym's command.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones" /> Sixxa would go on to become a valuable asset, defeating [[Harro Ruuk]] on Maramere, and later participating in the siege of [[Nod Kartha]] and the battle against [[Cavik Toth]] over [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Sixxa was cold-blooded and violent individual, willing to do anything to destroy the Trade Federation. He was also cunning, using rumors to his advantage. When Nym bested him in combat, he agreed to join forces under Nym's command,<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones" /> and would go on to win numerous battles against the Droid Army. Sixxa piloted a [[Scurrg H-6 Bomber/Legends|Scurrg H-6 prototype bomber]].<ref name="XWM">{{FFGXW|set=Scurrg H-6 Bomber Expansion Pack|cardname=Sol Sixxa}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Sol Sixxa was voiced by [[Jason London]] in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''.
